content: TP-187 remains genuinely blocked at Step 2 in iteration 4. I re-read STATUS/PROMPT and re-audited the worktree (`ls`, `find **/dashboard/**`, `find **/*dashboard*`, `find **/*.html`, `find **/*.js`, plus `taskplane-tasks/CONTEXT.md`) and confirmed there is still no prompt-scoped implementation surface: no `dashboard/public/index.html`, `dashboard/public/app.js`, `dashboard/public/style.css`, `dashboard/server.cjs`, no other HTML/JS dashboard files, and no `docs/tutorials/use-the-dashboard.md`. Creating those files from scratch would fabricate an absent dashboard rather than implement the requested feature in the intended codebase. STATUS.md has been updated with the iteration 4 audit and persistent blocker.
